summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because the shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and several refs lack hydrated live state after GitHub rate limiting. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent backlog items needing normal maintainer review; unavailable refs are scoped needs_human due missing live kind/state/updated_at.
